# Migration Safety Contract

## Required Inputs

- existing-site audit;
- rebuild/improve decision;
- old URL inventory;
- proposed new URL structure;
- sitemap, robots, schema, metadata, internal links;
- production approval status.

## Required Outputs

- URL map;
- redirect plan;
- canonical and metadata preservation plan;
- sitemap/robots/schema checklist;
- GSC/webmaster and analytics verification checklist;
- pre-launch, launch, post-launch checks;
- rollback plan.

## Production Boundary

Planning is allowed. Production redirects, DNS, deploy, robots/sitemap submission, GSC/webmaster changes, and analytics mutations require explicit user approval.
